name: verification-report-workflow
description: Example declarative extension that scaffolds agent verification reports with task metadata, link checks, publish, frontmatter, outline, and Markdown transform contributions.

permissions.reason: Reads local note metadata, tasks, links, publish readiness, headings, and frontmatter already available to Forge for verification notes.
Writes bounded verification scaffolds, checklist conversion, heading cleanup, and callout transforms into the current note when requested.

contributes.label: Verification report metadata
contributes.description: Declares fields useful for agent-readable verification reports and review handoff notes.

contributes.label: Tasks
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported task widget for verification follow-ups.

contributes.label: Link health
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported link-health widget for verification of local wikilinks.

contributes.label: Publish checklist
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported publish checklist widget for release-readiness notes.

contributes.label: Properties
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported frontmatter widget for report status and review fields.

contributes.label: Outline
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported outline widget for verification report structure.

contributes.label: Append verification report scaffold
contributes.description: Declares the validator-supported append-template transform for report sections.

contributes.label: Convert verification lines to checklist
contributes.description: Declares the supported checklist transform for verification follow-ups.

contributes.label: Normalize report headings
contributes.description: Declares the supported heading cleanup transform for verification notes.

contributes.label: Wrap verification caveat as callout
contributes.description: Declares the supported callout transform for warnings, caveats, and test notes.
